title: HighFrames
description: HighFrames is a lightweight Minecraft shader focused on delivering smooth gameplay with subtle visual enhancements like soft shadows, bloom, and animated water.
body:
![OV](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffa8681f03307e2de59f4f304399e0b6d57a0a10.png)




**HighFrames** is a performance-focused Minecraft shader designed for players who want better visuals without sacrificing FPS. It enhances the game with soft lighting, subtle shadows, gentle bloom effects, and smooth waving water while keeping resource usage extremely low.

Unlike **heavy shaders**, HighFrames keeps everything simple and optimized, making it perfect for low-end and mid-range systems. The shader improves the overall look of Minecraft without overloading your GPU, ensuring stable and high frame rates even during intense gameplay.

Key features include lightweight shadow rendering, soft bloom for a natural glow, animated water waves for a more dynamic environment, and balanced lighting that keeps the game clean and visually pleasing.

If you want a smooth experience with just the right amount of visual upgrade, HighFrames is built for you.

Perfomance
Specs used for FPS Testing

- Ryzen 5 3600
- RX6600
- 16GB DDR4

![FRAMES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd62ee867db84675954371962c18da9a486cd979_0.webp)
